## Summary

## Validation
- [ ] `npm run setup` (or `npm ci` + preflight) completed
- [ ] `npm run check:docs-links` passed
- [ ] `npm run check:versions` passed
- [ ] `npm run build` passed

## Documentation & Governance
- [ ] Canonical docs updated for behavior/config changes (`docs/runbook.md` or `docs/operations/runbook.md` as needed)
- [ ] No new top-level status markdown files added at repository root
- [ ] Migration changes follow `docs/deployment/database-migration-policy.md`
